sections.instruction: Questions 31-35: Complete the sentences below. Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS for each answer. Questions 36-40: Complete the summary below. Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS AND/OR A NUMBER for each answer.

questions.content:
31. According to George Bernard Shaw, men are supposed to understand {{BLANK}} economics and finance.
32. However, women are more prepared to {{BLANK}} about them.
33. Women tend to save for {{BLANK}} and a house.
34. Men tend to save for {{BLANK}} and for retirement.
35. Women who are left alone may have to pay for {{BLANK}} when they are old.

Saving for the future
Research indicates that many women only think about their financial future when a {{BLANK}} occurs. This is the worst time to make decisions. It is best for women to start thinking about pensions when they are in their {{BLANK}}. A good way for women to develop their {{BLANK}} in dealing with financial affairs would be to attend classes in {{BLANK}}. When investing in stocks and shares, it is suggested that women should put a high proportion of their savings in {{BLANK}}. In such ways, women can have a comfortable, independent retirement.
